svg.style: background:#FFFFFF; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
svg.text: Kimball Dimensional Modeling · Informatica PowerCenter · SQL Server → Oracle
Informatica PowerCenter — Staging Layer (as-is extract + load_date)
All staging tables include: load_date (audit watermark) · Categories, Suppliers flattened at staging level
stg_employeeterritories loaded separately — direct source for bridge_employee_territory weighting calculation
Built at DB level — Oracle CONNECT BY LEVEL
3 role-playing views: order · ship · required date
SCD Type 1 — insert / update in place
Surrogate key generation — all SCD2 dims
Target dim imported as source · SQL override: CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(sk))
Expression: max_sk + v_counter · Self-healing, zero external deps
SCD Type 1 — TRUNCATE + full reload each run
weighting_factor = 1/COUNT via SQL subquery · PK: (employee_key, territory_key)
fact_sales — grain: one row per order line
discount_amount = gross × discount · extended_amount = gross × (1 − discount)
ETL Auditing — per mapping, driven by batch files via pre/post session commands
Insert if new · Reset to STARTED if exists
UPDATE etl_audit: status, end_date, row counts
Drives incremental watermark for next run
All implemented via Windows batch files (.bat) called from PowerCenter pre/post session command fields
SQLPLUS invoked per session · no external scheduler required
Cleanup via Command Task (not pre-session SQL)
Runs outside session context — prevents TM_6273 session lock
Shipper · shipping_address · bridge — rerun overwrites in place, no rollback needed
Ezz Khalil · Retail DWH Portfolio Project
